name: labo-ai
description: Atomic neural architecture laboratory and agentic graph builder.
author: LABO AI

scripts.electron:dev: npm run build:electron && concurrently -k "vite --host 127.0.0.1" "wait-on tcp:5173 && VITE_DEV_SERVER_URL=http://127.0.0.1:5173 electron ."
scripts.electron:start: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron .
scripts.package:mac: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --mac dmg zip
scripts.package:mac:dir: npm run build && npm run build:electron && electron-builder --mac dir
scripts.test:desktop: npm run build && npm run build:electron && vitest run electron/atomic-runtime.test.ts electron/runtime.test.ts electron/security.test.ts electron/openai-credentials.test.ts electron/ask-labo.test.ts src/App.test.tsx src/core/graph-placement.test.ts src/core/agentic-graph.test.ts src/core/pytorch-compiler.test.ts && node scripts/desktop-smoke.mjs
